reasoning: Finland is a NATO member, so any Russian attempt to establish control over Finnish territory would trigger Article 5, resulting in direct conflict with NATO. Furthermore, Russia is deeply committed to its war in Ukraine and has actually depleted its garrisons near the Finnish border to support that effort. There is virtually no plausible pathway for Russia to commence a military or hybrid territorial seizure against Finland between May and December 2025. The probability remains at the lowest permissible floor.
